text.title: Structural Design Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the structural-patterns methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: document-signal
step.action: Write the symptom in observable terms (interface mismatch, class explosion, stacked behaviour).

step.name: shortlist-patterns
step.action: Pick 2-3 structural patterns whose intent matches.

step.name: score-cost-and-fit
step.action: Score each on fit (1-5) and cost (1-5); rule out cost > fit.

step.name: apply-pattern-specific-guards
step.action: If Decorator → check depth ≤ 2 plan; if Facade → check scope; if Flyweight → cite memory measurement.

step.name: emit-adr
step.action: Compose ADR with chosen + rejected + cost + guards + review trigger.
